title: Luffy Lands in Wano and Meets Tama
description: On pages 6–9, this part focuses on Unknown person #5, Unknown person #6, Unknown person #7, Unknown person #8 as Luffy lands in Wano, meets Tama, and immediately collides with the poverty and cruelty of Kaido’s rule.
scene: Luffy washes up in Wano, meets Tama, and discovers a country suffering under Kaido’s rule.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Oh, I'm so sorry! I was on my break! What do you need?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Can you call the owner chef, please? I'd like to talk to him before I leave.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Ah. Well, the thing is, he's out today. Getting ingredi-ents.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: And... leave, you said? You've yet to finish your food.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I have no reason to. If the chef isn't here, I'll be going.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But without any attention from you, the customer, these dishes will be so miserable!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Keh! Leave her, Sanji!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You just gotta let types like that leave!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Just make sure she pays her tab!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: No! I ain't sending her out of here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Anyone that pays is a cus- tower. I get it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: But, this woman's attitude...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: It's an insult to the other customers that come to our Estab- List!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If this was just some thug trying to pick a fight, I'd shut 'em up with my fists.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But these fists ain't enough for someone that has Bones to pick with our food!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: We've gotta teach her what happens to people that make light of the baratie!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: Patty! Carune!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: What do you think you know about our food?

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yer tone... I wonder if you'll be able to keep it up

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #7
dialogue.text: After tasting our specialities!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: I knew it! That's her!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: The gour- met known through- out the grand line!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: Sava- Rin!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: SAVARIN?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #8
dialogue.text: People call her the "sea- crossing tongue!"

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: She has columns in many different publications, including the news Coo's papers!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: As a chef, her food is served at Royal dinners! She's planned and coordinated enormous banquets! A true gourmet heavyweight! And she's got patrons throughout the worlds of politics and finance!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Her reviews have sunk many a restau- rant!

summary: This section advances the Wano Country Arrival storyline with 28 dialogue beats. Luffy’s first steps in Wano establish Tama’s kindness, the country’s hunger, and the brutality of Kaido’s forces.
